versions.version_description: All lyrics with accompanying chords. Full chord legend included. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oqTq8gckf8E.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
...WITH YOU, I'M BORN AGAIN... by Billy Preston & Syreeta
------------------------------...........................

*Released 1980*


Intro:

[ch]Dm[/ch]  C6/9, [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]A7sus[/ch]

Verse 1: (Billy)

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Come bring me, your softness, comfort me through all this madness.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                         A7b9sus  [ch]A7b9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 Woman, don't you know with you; I'm born a-gain.[/tab]

Verse 2: (Syreeta)

[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Come give me your sweetness, now there's you there is no weakness.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                     A7b9sus   [ch]A7b9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 Lying safe within your arms; I'm born a-gain.[/tab]

Bridge 1:

(Billy):

[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
 I was half, not whole, in step with none.[/tab]

(Syreeta):

[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]A7sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
 Reaching through this world, in need of one.[/tab]

Verse 3: (Both)

[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
Come show me, your kindness, in your arms I know I'll find this.[/tab]

(Billy):

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                         A7b9sus  [ch]A7b9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 Woman, don't you know with you; I'm born a-gain.[/tab]

(Syreeta):

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                       Ab79sus [ch]A7b9[/ch] ([ch]Dsus4[/ch])
 Lying safe with you; I'm born    a    -gain.[/tab]

Interlude:

[ch]Dsus4[/ch]  D, [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] (x2)

Verse 4: (Billy)

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Come bring me, your softness, comfort me through all this madness.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                         A7b9sus  [ch]A7b9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 Woman, don't you know with you; I'm born a-gain.[/tab]

Verse 5: (Syreeta)

[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Come give me your sweetness, now there's you there is no weakness.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                     A7b9sus   [ch]A7b9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 Lying safe within your arms; I'm born a-gain.[/tab]

Bridge 2: (Both)

[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
 I was half, not whole, in step with none.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]A7sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
 Reaching through this world, in need of one.[/tab]

*KEY CHANGE*
------------

Verse 6:

(Both):

[tab]     [ch]Ebm[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]      [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Come show me, your kindness, in your arms I know I'll find this.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm7[/ch]                        Bb7b9sus  [ch]Bb7b9[/ch]  [ch]Ebm[/ch]   [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
 Woman, don't you know with you;  I'm born a-gain.[/tab]

Coda:

[tab][ch]Abm7[/ch]                                [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
 Lying safe with you; I'm born... a-gain...[/tab]


CHORD DIAGRAMS:
---------------

   [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]C6/9[/ch]   [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]A7sus[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]   A7b9sus  [ch]A7b9[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 xx0231  x00010  x13231  x02030  x02013  353333  x00333  x02323  xx0233

   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Ebm[/ch]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]    [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Abm7[/ch]  Bb7b9sus

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 xx0232  xx0230  032010  x68876  686666  x24342  464444  x11101


Tabbed by Joel from cLuMsY, Bristol, England, 2007 (clumsyband@hotmail.com)
